channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Hegseth: "Manufactured story" that U.S. faces munitions stockpile shortage
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth testified before the Senate Armed Service Committee earlier this year that replenishing the stockpile could take "month...

item.title: Trump backs Collins in Georgia Senate runoff, his latest MAGA pick in GOP primaries
item.description: Days before the Georgia Senate runoff, President Donald Trump has announced his endorsement.

item.title: US intends to finalize Iran deal on Sunday, Ambassador Waltz says
item.description: U.S. Ambassador to the UN Mike Waltz spoke on ABC News' 'This Week' as U.S. and Iranian officials signal a framework peace deal is near.

item.title: Georgia's vote-counting method will soon be banned; lawmakers seek fix this week
item.description: Georgia lawmakers are expected to address an election issue of their own making when they return for a special session this week.
